title: E-hailing driver shot dead in Pietermaritzburg
description: NATIONAL NEWS - An e-hailing driver was shot...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - An e-hailing driver was shot dead in Pietermaritzburg on Sunday morning.


> According to Mi7 National Group, its Emergency Medical Services was dispatched after its Armed Response UNits requested medical assistance at a crime scene on Queen Street.


This incident happened just after 06:00.

The medics made their way to Queen Street and found armed response teams and police around a stationary vehicle in which the driver appeared unconscious.

Read the full article in The Witness.

Article: Caxton Network News

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
